chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-7574 of 2019 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of Misc. No.33413/2019 2. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 24.05.2022. Mr. Atir Aqeel Ansari, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG along with Mr. Gobin Kumar, DCIR. >><< After hearing the matter at considerable length, with the consent of the learned counsel for the parties, the instant petition is disposed of in the following manner: 1. That with regard to the whole stock, as determined by the relevant authorities, the petitioner would be allowed to file sales tax return manually and to claim input and output tax in accordance with law and rules, including Sales Tax Act and the SROs issued from time to time by the FBR. 2. That the department would be at liberty to conduct audit with regard to the said returns in order to verify the veracity or otherwise of the record relating to the claim of input /output tax. With the above directions the instant petition stands disposed of along with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE
